title: Foundation of Applied AI & Machine Learning

yaml.title: Foundation of Applied AI & Machine Learning
yaml.subtitle: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Technology (RIT), Kottayam
yaml.author: Siju Swamy

markdown.markdown:
This 20-hour intensive foundation course transitions engineering students from fundamental mathematics to deploying modern Generative AI applications. 

### Pre-flight Checklist for Students
Before our first session, please ensure you have completed the following:

1. **GitHub Account:** Create a free account at [github.com](https://github.com/).
2. **Kaggle Account:** Register at [kaggle.com](https://kaggle.com/) to access our datasets.
3. **Google Colab:** Ensure you can access [Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/) using your personal or university email.

---

## Course Schedule & Quick Links

| Session | Topic | Slides | Assessment Sheet |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---:|
| **1 & 2** | Mathematical Foundations for AI | [Module 1](modules/module1_math.qmd) | Quiz 1 |
| **3, 4 & 5** | Classical Machine Learning & Workflows | [Module 2](modules/module2_ml.qmd) | Micro-Project 1 |
| **6 & 7** | Deep Learning Architectures | [Module 3](modules/module3_dl.qmd) | Quiz 2 |
| **8 & 9** | NLP & Generative AI | [Module 4](modules/module4_nlp.qmd) | Quiz 3 |
| **10** | Capstone Integration & Deployment | [Module 5](modules/module5_deploy.qmd) | Capstone Rubric |

***
*This course is strictly aligned with the NBA Outcome-Based Education (OBE) framework.*

## Welcome to the Course
This 20-hour intensive foundation course transitions engineering students from fundamental mathematics to deploying modern Generative AI applications. 

### Pre-flight Checklist for Students
Before our first session, please ensure you have completed the following:

1. **GitHub Account:** Create a free account at [github.com](https://github.com/).
2. **Kaggle Account:** Register at [kaggle.com](https://kaggle.com/) to access our datasets.
3. **Google Colab:** Ensure you can access [Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/) using your personal or university email.

---

## Course Schedule & Quick Links

| Session | Topic | Slides | Assessment Sheet |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---:|

| **3, 4 & 5** | Classical Machine Learning & Workflows | [Module 2](modules/module2_ml.qmd) | Micro-Project 1 |
| **6 & 7** | Deep Learning Architectures | [Module 3](modules/module3_dl.qmd) | Quiz 2 |
| **8 & 9** | NLP & Generative AI | [Module 4](modules/module4_nlp.qmd) | Quiz 3 |
| **10** | Capstone Integration & Deployment | [Module 5](modules/module5_deploy.qmd) | Capstone Rubric |

***
*This course is strictly aligned with the NBA Outcome-Based Education (OBE) framework.*

metadata.title: Foundation of Applied AI & Machine Learning
metadata.subtitle: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Technology (RIT), Kottayam
metadata.author: Siju Swamy
metadata.institution: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Technology, Kottayam
metadata.prerequisites: Basic programming proficiency, introductory engineering mathematics
metadata.description:
A comprehensive 20-hour intensive course on Applied AI and Machine Learning 
designed for engineering students from all disciplines. Covers mathematical 
foundations, classical ML, deep learning, NLP with transformers, and deployment 
with Streamlit. Includes hands-on projects and capstone implementation.

open-graph.title: Foundation of Applied AI & Machine Learning
open-graph.description: Comprehensive AI/ML course for engineering students

metadata.copyright: © 2026 Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Technology, Kottayam

course_outcomes.CO1: Apply foundational principles of linear algebra, calculus, and probability to formulate machine learning models and optimization strategies.

course_outcomes.CO2: Implement and evaluate supervised and unsupervised classical machine learning algorithms using standard Python frameworks and structured datasets.

course_outcomes.CO3: Develop deep learning architectures, analyzing the performance impact of activation functions and loss configurations.

course_outcomes.CO4: Design and deploy end-to-end generative AI pipelines, including Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems, utilizing modern deployment frameworks.
